Applicants to Kindergarten must turn five years old by September 1st of the year they enter Kindergarten.
Please read the steps below to learn more about the process and events for the grade to which you are interested in applying and reach out if you have any questions.

schools.name: The Dalton School admissions
hints: Apply Online The Dalton School on Instagram The Dalton School on Facebook The Dalton School on LinkedIn The Dalton School on Vimeo Apply Steps to Apply Apply to Dalton Steps to Apply Affording Dalton Meet the Team First Program Kindergar...
In order to apply to Kindergarten, all children must be 5 years old by September 1 of the year they enter Kindergarten.
Students born in June, July, or August should consult with their early childhood directors about the student’s readiness to apply.
Dalton adheres strictly to a May 31 deadline for children with summer birthdays.
Kindergarten applications open on August 13 and will be accepted until 12:00 PM on November 13.
Enrollment notifications will be posted on Ravenna in February, per the ISAAGNY timetable .
School Application Through Ravenna The application is available in Ravenna after 12:00 PM on August 13 and due no later than noon on November 13.
To begin the process of applying, a short preliminary application form and an application fee of $75 are required.

schools.name: Collegiate School admissions
hints: Please see below the steps required for completing your application.
Applicants to Kindergarten can begin the application process immediately.

Step 2 – School Report Please request your current school to fill out the Collegiate Confidential Report Form For Kindergarten and have them submit it directly to our Admissions Office by January 5, 2026.
Schools may also submit the ISAAGNY Confidential School Report if they prefer.
The School Report must be received, directly from your child's school, no later than January 5, 2026, in order for your application to be complete.
Step 3 – Required Parent Interview, Required Applicant Visit, and Optional Parent Tour We encourage you to submit an application and schedule your required visits at your earliest convenience.
In-Person Kindergarten Applicant Visit: Applicants are observed and assessed in a small group format by Lower School teachers and members of the Admissions team.
On-site child visits with fun, child-friendly activities are scheduled at 3:30 pm on Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday, and we also offer a couple of Saturday options.

schools.name: The Allen-Stevenson School admissions
hints: A-S Application FAQ Are seasonal tours available for prospective parents?
Yes, we offer spring tours in April and May and fall tours with the submission of an application.
Does Allen-Stevenson offer Financial Aid?
Please visit Tuition & Financial Aid for more specific information.
Yes, boys must be 5 years old by September 1 for the year they begin Kindergarten—in other words, September 1, 2027, for this admissions season.
We encourage you to apply early to complete the admissions process, especially if you would like to be considered for “early notification,” in accordance with ISAAGNY policies.
The application fee is $75 and is waived if you are applying for Financial Aid.
Each year, we accept applications for Transitional Kindergarten, Kindergarten and Grade 6.

schools.name: The Allen-Stevenson School visits/events
hints: Fall Tours Applications for the 2027-2028 school year go live on August 27, 2026 .
After submitting an application, prospective parents will have a parent-led tour of the School.
During the tour, you will have an opportunity to experience the life of the School and see our students in action.
Throughout our admissions process, you will learn more about our program through parent-led tours, open houses and events, and an in-person chat with Duncan Lyon, Head of School.

Upcoming events Full Calendar Cornerstones TK Allen-Stevenson's Cornerstones Transitional Kindergarten program, was developed to help younger five-year-old boys build the skills and confidence needed to be Kindergarten-ready.
Please visit the Cornerstones webpage HERE to learn more.

schools.name: Trevor Day School admissions/events
hints: So much lies ahead!    Warmly,   The Lower School Admissions Team Preschool–Grade 5 1 West 88th Street, New York, NY 10024 Applicants for Entry in Fall 2027 The application deadline for the 2026-2027 school year has ...
Applications for the 2027-2028 school year will be available on Ravenna in mid to late August.  Our fall tours run from October to December on Thursdays at 9:00 am.
Sign-up will be available on Ravenna in late August.
Should you have questions about your Ravenna account, please contact Ravenna-help@communitybrands.com.
Apply The application for the 2027-2028 school year will be available in August 2026.
To begin the admission process, please submit a completed application, along with a $75 non-refundable application fee at  www.ravenna-hub.com.
Birthday requirements are listed below.    Threes applicants: Applicants for Threes must be 2.10 by August 31st of the year they hope to enter Trevor.
Pre-Kindergarten applicants: Applicants for Pre-K must turn four by September 1st of the year they hope to enter Trevor.

schools.name: The Browning School admissions/events
hints: Admission FAQs WHAT IS THE APPLICATION FEE?
A non-refundable application fee of $75 must accompany each application.
The tuition for the 2026-2027 academic year is $71,670.
Admission decisions are made independently of financial need.
Please visit our tuition and financial aid webpage to learn more about the application process and requirements.
WHAT IS THE DEADLINE FOR SUBMITTING AN APPLICATION AND SCHEDULING APPOINTMENTS?
Applications for entry in 2027 will open on Monday, August 10, 2026.
The deadline to submit a preliminary application is Tuesday, December 1, 2026 —but we encourage you not to wait.

schools.name: NYC DOE Kindergarten
hints: Families who applied by the January 23 deadline can access their offer in one of the following ways: go to MySchools.nyc call 718-935-2009 contact a Family Welcome Center Accept your offer by May 1s t to secure your Kindergarten seat.
If your child was born in 2021 and lives in New York City, they are eligible to attend kindergarten in fall 2026.
The kindergarten application for Fall 2026 is closed.
If you missed the deadline, you can still participate in admissions by adding yourself to the waitlist.
Please visit Myschools.nyc to search and join waitlists.
Fall 2026 Admissions Timeline Below are the key dates for families applying during the 2025-2026 school year for admission to the 2026-2027 school year.

Tuesday, December 9, 2025: Kindergarten Application Opens Friday, January 23, 2026: Kindergarten Application Closes Tuesday, March 31, 2026: Kindergarten Offer Release Sign up now for 2026 kindergarten admissions process updates .
Every five-year-old New York City resident is guaranteed a seat in a public school kindergarten program beginning in September the calendar year they turn five.
